articles.title: Medical officials warn of potential health impacts of Billy Bishop airport expansion
articles.summary: While it’s still unclear what an expanded Billy Bishop Toronto City Airport could look like, public health officials say increasing the number of planes operating near the waterfront will likely come with health impacts for residents in the area. Air pollution and noise are two concerns that were raised by the city’s top doctor, Michelle […]

articles.title: Senior seriously injured after car crashes into Scarborough school building
articles.summary: A senior was rushed to a hospital Monday afternoon following a serious collision in Scarborough. Emergency crews were called to the Port Union area, near Lawrence Avenue East and Charlottetown Boulevard just before 4 p.m. Toronto police say two vehicles were involved in the crash and one of them went into a building. One driver […]

articles.title: Motorcyclist killed in Mississauga collision, Peel police say
articles.summary: The fatal collision happened just before 10 p.m. Sunday near Argentia and Kitimat roads, police say.

articles.title: Marina Mabrey scores 30 as Tempo hold off Liberty in Montreal, ending 4-game skid
articles.summary: The Toronto Tempo held off a late-game charge from the New York Liberty on Sunday, winning 93-91 to end a four-game losing streak in their second of two games at the Bell Centre in Montreal.

articles.title: Bonnie Crombie announces intention to run for mayor of Mississauga
articles.summary: After a short stint leading the Ontario Liberals, Bonnie Crombie is looking to get her old job back as mayor of Mississauga, Ont.

articles.title: 64-year-old woman dead after being struck by dump truck in Ajax: police
articles.summary: Durham police say a 64-year-old woman is dead after being struck by a dump truck in Ajax on Saturday.

articles.title: Man, 68, dead after being struck by vehicle in Pickering parking lot: Durham police
articles.summary: Durham police say a 68-year-old man is dead after being struck by a vehicle in a Pickering parking lot Saturday.

articles.title: Woman dead after being hit by truck in Ajax: Durham police
articles.summary: A woman has died after she was struck by a commercial truck while walking in Ajax Saturday afternoon, according to Durham Regional Police Service.
